description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a thick layer of light brown chocolate mousse or whipped cream piped decoratively on top. The surface is adorned with several garnishes, including fresh raspberries, chocolate pieces, and cookies, some of which are dusted with powdered sugar. There are also small chocolate chips and what appears to be a light dusting of cocoa powder scattered across the top. The cake base is dark, likely a rich chocolate sponge or brownie layer, and the overall appearance is indulgent and festive. The cake sits directly on a flat surface without any visible plate or tray.
description: A round chocolate cake topped with piped chocolate mousse, fresh raspberries, chocolate pieces, and cookies, dusted with cocoa and powdered sugar.
description_view_0: The cake is seen from above, highlighting the decorative piped chocolate mousse, scattered raspberries, and cookies with powdered sugar.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the thickness of the mousse layer and the arrangement of chocolate pieces and raspberries along the edge.
description_view_2: A low angle shows the cake's height, the piped mousse, and the chocolate base, with raspberries and cookies visible on top.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the cluster of raspberries and cookies dusted with powdered sugar, with the piped mousse and chocolate base visible.
